html.p: notes: Similar to R-HSA-1237320.1 and R-HSA-1247668.4, without proton for balacing protonation effects as needed
notes: Similar to R-HSA-1237320.1 and R-HSA-1247668.4, CO2 and proton for balacing protonation effects as needed

reaction.name: Pyruvate transport in via proton symport
Oxidation of iron (II) via hydrogen peroxide
ATP-binding Cassette (ABC) export of unconjugated billirubin
Load due to sodium potassium pump
Load due to methemoglobin reduction via CytB5
Load due to glutathione reduction from GSSG to GSH

groups:member.groups:name: Load due to glutathione reduction from GSSG to GSH

Oxidation of iron (II) via hydrogen peroxide
Load due to sodium potassium pump
Load due to methemoglobin reduction via CytB5
ATP-binding Cassette (ABC) export of unconjugated billirubin
